headline: Pre-release issue burndown (before cutting 0.12.0). CLOSED this session: #62 (multi-brand data-brand overlays + HdsThemeProvider runtime switch — verified shipping in dist + test-locked, unblocks #68); #48 (Satoshi typography — code-side complete/shipping, Figma text-style swap split to #109). #60 audited: coverage 48/131 is an architectural ceiling — remaining non-cva components are thin wrappers, metadata-only tone, numeric-sized, or CSS-in-JS/motion needing a #93-style migration first; recommended as post-release migration PRs, not a blocker. #64 Astro consumption HDS-side SHIPPED on branch (/brand overlay bridge + CONSUMING.md §12), proven in clients#30 (all 6 apps green, pixel-identical, full HDS spine), pending 0.12.0 release. PRIOR (merged to main): layout epic #95 (#92/#96/#97/#98) + #93 CSS-in-JS→Tailwind migration (#103-#108).
next: CUT @hirobius/design-system 0.12.0 (minor changeset carries /brand + overlay bridge). check:release/publish is human-only. Then clients#30 runs pnpm install to wire the factory against the published version.
Post-release: #60 stateful CSS-in-JS→Tailwind+cva migrations, one PR per component (side-nav, doc-link-card, …) with pixel-parity verification.

Human/Figma-gated (not release blockers): #109 Figma Satoshi text-style swap (use_figma flaky); #47 Figma Code Connect; #80 Chromatic baseline review + freeze; #86 secrets standard (Bitwarden classification).
Deferred Phase 2: #66 expression layer; #68 niche reskins (now unblocked by #62).
blocked: #64 clients wiring (clients#30) waits on the 0.12.0 npm release (proven locally against a pnpm-pack tarball).
#109 Figma Satoshi text-style swap — use_figma MCP tool repeatedly drops with 'permission stream closed'; needs a stable Figma session or human run.
